title: NiSource: A Risky Bet In A Stable Industry
text: During times of economic uncertainty, investors often look for safer investments that can offer stable returns, which makes utility companies, like NiSource, attractive to investors. Revenue growth of NiSource has been sluggish in the past decade, increasing just over 10%, lagging behind many of its peers.
